nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-throated cacholote
nodes.summary: White-throated cacholote（White-throated cacholote，学名 Pseudoseisura gutturalis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in central Argentina. The geographic dividing line or overlap area between them is unclear. The species inhabits generally barren landscapes such as arid scrublands in lowlands and montane valleys; in the north it also occurs in woodlands dominated by Prosopis

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. It is considered uncommon to fairly common and "[e]vidently tolerant of fairly extensive anthropogenic habitat disturbance"
